item.title: AI-Driven Defect Detection with Machine Vision
item.description: Join us for an exclusive webinar hosted by the ASQ - World Headquarters Automotive Division to dive deep into how AI and Machine Vision are transforming defect detection into a proactive, data-driven strategy. Learn how to bridge the gap between AI promises and real-world production line deployment.

item.title: Automated Defect Recognition & AI in Digital Radiography - OnestopNDT
item.description: This webinar is designed to provide valuable insights into the practical applications of AI in NDT and Digital Radiography. Discover how AI-driven solutions can enhance inspection efficiency, accuracy, and productivity in your industry.

item.title: Automated Defect Recognition and Artificial Intelligence (AI) in Digital Radiography
item.description: This webinar examines how AI and automated defect recognition (ADR) are transforming digital radiography, shifting the bottleneck from image acquisition to evaluation, and covering applications, standards, and regulatory considerations in NDT.

item.title: AI for NDT Professionals: Improving Accuracy, Speed, and Reliability | ASNT Education
item.description: Explore how AI is transforming NDT through automated defect recognition in digital radiography. This webinar highlights practical implementation strategies, real-world case studies, and key benefits such as faster analysis, improved accuracy, and reduced costs.

item.title: Beyond Defect Detection: The New Rules of AI Quality Control in 2026 - Zetamotion
item.description: We kicked off 2026 with our first webinar of the year, Beyond Defect Detection: The New Rules of AI Quality Control in 2026. The goal was simple. Look ahead at what is changing in machine vision, and talk honestly about why so many AI inspection projects still struggle to move beyond pilots and into full scale production.

item.title: Expert-to-Expert Webinar on Zero-Defect Manufacturing | European Cluster Collaboration Platform
item.description: The IDEALIST project is organising a new Expert-to-Expert webinar focused on Zero-Defect Manufacturing, bringing together industry professionals to discuss innovative approaches to advanced quality assurance in manufacturing. Expert-to-Expert webinars are one of the key formats through which IDEALIST supports manufacturing companies in exploring advanced technologies through peer-to-peer knowledge exchange. Hosted on the AGORA platform, these online sessions provide a space for experts and practitioners to share real use cases and practical solutions for industrial production.

item.title: Engineering confidence in Precision Manufacturing
item.description: Join us and explore how advanced optical 3D metrology helps evaluate complex parts as: geometry, surface functionality, and durability.
